description: Storage-independent Outbox<S: OutboxStore> protocol (#lzdurableoutbox). Backends provide ordered byte CRUD only; the shared protocol owns cursor monotonicity, prune safety, ascending replay, and crash reload.

scenarios.name: unordered puts replay in ascending epoch order
ack cursor is monotone and prune-safe
restart reloads cursor and unacked suffix
stale handle cannot regress serialized cursor
